debug_info.goal:
U : Type
⊢ ctble U ↔ ∃ f, one_to_one f

failed_attempts:
by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum] at h
    obtain ⟨A, hA⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨g, hg1, _⟩ := hA
    exists (λ x ↦ (g x).val)
    intro x1 x2 h
    apply hg1
    apply Subtype.eq h
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum]
    exists range f
    exists (λ x ↦ ⟨f x, x, rfl⟩)
    apply And.intro
    · intro x1 x2 h
      exact hf (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
    · intro y
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := y.property
      exists x
      apply Subtype.eq
      exact hx
